title: Decathlon India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Decathlon India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Decathlon India in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Decathlon India:
Decathlon India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Decathlon India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
